title: cyclogramma auriculata
intro: Cyclogramma auriculata, also known as the ear-leaved spleenwort, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclogramma auriculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Cyclogramma auriculata is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
